creator: martti.kuparinen@iki.fi
text:
Here's an update for the GnuCash port.

Fix: 

--f2HAZpX50876.984825351/morse.home.net----UvwhslbWA2dakgZmYnKmCSPDW4jO9BbNzvEBOqUIPmeCmtwp
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ur /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash/Makefile gnucash/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash/Makefile	Wed Jan 24 18:40:17 2001
+++ gnucash/Makefile	Sat Mar 17 11:05:37 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	gnucash
-PORTVERSION=	1.4.9
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.10
 CATEGORIES=	deskutils gnome
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.gnucash.org/pub/gnucash/sources/stable/ \
 		ftp://ftp.gnucash.org/pub/gnucash/sources/stable/ \
diff -ur /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash/distinfo gnucash/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash/distinfo	Sat Dec  9 07:19:51 2000
+++ gnucash/distinfo	Fri Mar 16 19:33:43 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (gnucash-1.4.9.tar.gz) = 7cb6231208b28fa619a900020f96aa66
+MD5 (gnucash-1.4.10.tar.gz) = 06b4f90eab57183a77199db07051467f
